source: Seeded from ecosystem naming in the stylebook and example governance needs.

accents.name: Crystal Gold
accents.intent: Premium executive guidance and decision emphasis.

accents.name: Horizon Sky
accents.intent: Calm planning, readability, and human workflow support.

accents.name: Constellation Indigo
accents.intent: Layered ecosystem exploration and connected overview.

accents.name: Blueprint Cyan
accents.intent: Technical construction, creation, and production clarity.

accents.name: Signal Lime
accents.intent: Terminal clarity, system states, and active technical feedback.

accents.name: Ember Orange
accents.intent: Performance urgency and high-energy technical throughput.

accents.name: Atrium Teal
accents.intent: Premium openness, glass depth, and strategic overview.

accents.name: Paper Indigo
accents.intent: Quiet analytical depth and low-noise reading environments.
